summary: The diff implements REQ-1 correctly. CounselingPage.tsx now imports and uses TallyFormEmbed with formId='EkX2OB' instead of the native CounselingBookingForm. TallyFormEmbed.tsx is updated with the correct iframe attributes (data-tally-src, loading=lazy, width=100%, height=897, frameBorder=0, marginHeight=0, marginWidth=0, title prop) and a useEffect that loads the Tally embed script dynamically, checking for existing Tally definition and script tag. The scroll-to-form ref is preserved. All other page sections (hero, session expectations, benefits) are retained. The CounselingBookingForm component file is not removed.
